query: Run /handover again. We just fixed the two failing tests in auth.test.ts. We also discovered that the JWT_SECRET env var is not set in the staging .env file — this must be fixed before the next deploy.
expected_behavior: Detects that a handover file for today already exists
Appends to the existing file — does not create a new file or overwrite
Uses a --- divider followed by a ### Session HH:MM heading
Does not re-copy or duplicate content from the earlier session
What Was Done (append section) mentions fixing the auth.test.ts tests
Gotchas section in the append mentions the missing JWT_SECRET in staging .env
The original handover content from the earlier session is preserved intact
Updates .resonance/01_state.md Next Session to reflect the now-resolved test failures
